case_title: LAU EDWARD C Y LAW OFFICES OF EDWARD C Y LAU VS QIAN XIAOJU

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT.RETURN REC.FOR QIAN XIAO JU.NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU EDWARD C Y LAW OFFICES OF EDWARD C Y LAU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QIAN XIAOJU $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $17.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,517.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO QIAN XIAOJU RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
